rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.1087, which governs school facility security reviews. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.1087. SECURITY REVIEW. (a) If a school district constructs, acquires, renovates, or improves a district facility, the district shall, as soon as practicable, conduct a security review of the facility
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses school safety security reviews, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
